div.p: Color Key 🟧 Orange: Hot RX path (frequently accessed) 🟪 Purple: TX path data ⬜ Gray: Statistics/metadata 🟩 Green: Hash table structure

g.text: Cache Line 0: Hot RX Path Data
version = even (0, 2, 4, ...) | Stable — safe to read
version = odd (1, 3, 5, ...) | Write in progress — retry
Readers: spin until even, read, verify unchanged

ul.li: Pre-allocate at startup (no malloc in data path)

g.text: Hash compute | ~10 ns | 3 XOR + shift ops
Bucket access | ~5 ns | L1 cache hit
Avg chain length | 0.61 | mostly single entry
Memory footprint | 2.56 MB | conn pool only
Hash table overhead | 128 KB | pointer array
Readers | Zero overhead | No locks, no atomics
Grace period | Writer wait | For in-flight reads
Memory reclaim | Deferred | After grace period
